top_signals.title: The Supreme Court Contradicted Itself
top_signals.summary: The Supreme Court has issued two opinions that affect the independence of the US Federal Reserve, creating an extremely high-risk strategy, explains Bloomberg Opinion columnist and Harvard Law professor Noah Feldman. (Source: Bloomberg)
